message:
feat(frankenterm-core): add HTS/TBC/CBT/ECH/DECKPAM/DECKPNM parser support (bd-255jd)

Wire ESC H (HTS), ESC =/> (DECKPAM/DECKPNM), CSI g (TBC), CSI Z (CBT),
and CSI X (ECH) into the parser state machine with 6 new Action variants.
Add 8 parser unit tests and 4 tab-stop conformance fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
